g.title: Server waiting for SYN SND.UNA = ISS, RCV.NXT = 0
Client sent SYN, waiting for SYN-ACK SND.NXT = ISS+1
Server received SYN, sent SYN-ACK Waiting for ACK
Connection open Data transfer phase
Active closer sent FIN Waiting for ACK
FIN ACKed Waiting for peer FIN
Received FIN from peer Waiting for app close
Simultaneous close Sent FIN, got FIN before ACK
Passive closer sent FIN Waiting for final ACK
Waiting 2*MSL (60s) Absorbing delayed segments
